raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I placed an order for an pc on best buy that was {$1000.00}. The order was supposed to be delivered on XX/XX/XXXX. The order stated that it was delivered to my address but i did not receive my order. I refunded on best buy and received my money. til XXXX weeks later i noticed on XX/XX/XXXX that they have recharged me for every item i have disputed.
